Vendored from crt-screen v1.2.0 (single source of truth: ~/crt-screen).

Do NOT edit crt.css / crt.js here — they are a snapshot. To upgrade, re-copy
both files from the upstream repo and bump the version below.

  vendored: crt.css, crt.js
  version:  1.2.0

Integration glue lives in ../../crt-screen-integration.js (project-specific;
safe to edit). See that file and the "Enhanced CRT" toggle in Theme settings.
